name: Mountebank
description: Open-source service virtualization tool supporting HTTP, HTTPS, TCP and SMTP, letting teams replace dependencies with programmable imposters.

seo.title: Mountebank — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Mountebank: Open-source service virtualization tool supporting HTTP, HTTPS, TCP and SMTP, letting teams replace dependencies with programmable imposters.

when_to_use: Service virtualization for HTTP, TCP, SMTP dependencies
Programmable imposters for contract testing scenarios
Simulate third-party API behavior in integration tests
Record and replay real service interactions as stubs

pros: Covers HTTP, HTTPS, TCP and SMTP in one tool
Programmable imposters with predicates and responses
cons: Docs can feel academic and dense
Maintenance pace has slowed in recent years
Less polished than WireMock for HTTP-only needs
review.verdict: Powerful multi-protocol service virtualization, overkill when WireMock or MSW already fit.
review.best_for: Teams virtualizing non-HTTP protocols alongside HTTP in one tool
review.not_for: Pure HTTP projects where WireMock or MSW are simpler choices
